habitat: South and SE Asia; common in Indian and Thai herbalism.
traditionalUsesEn: Intensely bitter traditional herb for feverish colds in Ayurveda and Thai medicine.
traditionalUsesDe: Sehr bitteres traditionelles Kraut bei fiebrigen Erkältungen in Ayurveda und thailändischer Medizin.
cautions: Very bitter. May affect fertility and immune drugs—professional advice. Not for pregnancy.
historicalNotes: Called king of bitters; WHO monographs discuss traditional cold use.
habitatDe: South und SE Asien; common in Indienn und Thai herbalism.
cautionsDe: Very bitter. May affect fertility und immune drugs—fachlicher Rat. Not für Schwangerschaft.
historicalNotesDe: Called king von bitters; WHO monographs discuss traditionell cold use.
